function.name: verify_member_identity
function.description: Verify a Acme Health member's identity using full name, date of birth, and either member ID or ZIP code before disclosing any protected health information.

fullName.description: Member's full legal name as it appears on their Acme record

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

memberId.description: Acme member ID, format MEM-XXX. Optional if zipCode is provided.

zipCode.description: 5-digit ZIP code on file. Optional if memberId is provided.

function.name: lookup_prescriptions
function.description: List the active prescriptions for a verified Acme member.

includeExpired.description: Include expired prescriptions in results. Default false.

function.name: request_refill
function.description: Request a refill of an active prescription for a verified Acme member.

pharmacy.description: Where to fill: in-person pickup at Acme pharmacy, or 90-day mail order

pharmacyLocation.description: Acme pharmacy location name (required if pharmacy is 'pickup')

function.name: find_in_network_providers
function.description: Search the Acme Health in-network provider directory by specialty and location.

acceptingNewPatients.description: Only return providers currently accepting new patients. Default true.

function.name: calculate_medication_price
function.description: Calculate the member copay for a specific medication under the Acme Health Plus formulary.
